# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please use GitHub's
"Report a vulnerability" feature to submit your report privately.

Do NOT open a public issue for security-related reports.

Please include:

- A detailed description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce the issue
- Potential impact assessment
- Any suggested remediation, if available

We will acknowledge receipt of the report as soon as possible and
work to resolve validated issues in a timely manner.

## Scope

This policy applies to:

- The walrus-sites-notary repository
- The deployed service at https://notary.wal.app

Reports related to supply chain integrity, build provenance verification,
or on-chain anchoring mechanisms are especially important.

## Supported Versions

The latest release is supported and maintained.
Older versions may not receive security updates.

## Disclosure Process

We follow a responsible disclosure process.
Security fixes may be prepared and deployed prior to public disclosure
to protect users and ecosystem participants.
